name: Oats Transportation Inc
carrier_operation: Private Passenger (Business) / Passenger - Interstate; nonprofit transit (DBA OATS Transit)
fmcsa_address: 2501 Maguire Blvd Suite #101, Columbia, MO 65201 (system-wide HQ; St. Joseph location at 1306 S 58th St is the OATS Northwest Region facility)
inc_date: 1970 (founded in Macon, MO; converted to nonprofit 501(c)(3) in 1973)
officers: unknown (statewide nonprofit; Beth Langley listed as Northwest Regional Director)
registry_source: Missouri Secretary of State (OATS, Inc. is the legal entity) / Wikipedia / OATS Transit official site
notes: The Saint Joseph, MO address at 1306 S 58th St is the OATS Transit Northwest Region office (opened August 2010). The legal carrier of record is 'OATS Inc' (a.k.a. OATS, Inc. d/b/a OATS Transit), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit serving all 114 Missouri counties. The input 'Oats Transportation Inc' refers to this organization (sometimes informally called Oats Transportation). Power units/drivers reflect the system-wide FMCSA snapshot, not just the NW Region depot. A separate small 'Oats Transportation Inc' taxi service exists in Chillicothe MO but does not match the input address.

name: Northstar Bus
inc_date: 2000-01-01 (BBB-reported business start date; NY DOS filing date not verified)
entity_status: unknown (likely Active per BBB; not directly confirmed in NY DOS)
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations (no confident name match retrievable via public search) / BBB and directory listings
notes: Northstar Bus operates at 9804 Ditmas Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11236 (phone 718-567-7500 / 718-513-0869); BBB reports a 1/1/2000 business start date and ~10-19 employees, ~$1-2.5M annual revenue. Two SAFER records share the 'Northstar' name but neither matches: USDOT 724104 NORTHSTAR BUS CO INC is at 1845 Smith St, North Providence, RI (13 power units, 24 drivers, Satisfactory 2008, currently INACTIVE per a separate SAFER lookup), and USDOT 2918561 NORTHSTAR BUS LINES LLC is at 11800 95th Ave N, Maple Grove, MN (169 power units, 225 drivers, Satisfactory 2023, Active). Neither is in Brooklyn. The Brooklyn entity likely operates intrastate under NY DOT only (no USDOT), consistent with NYC OPT school bus contractors. Unable to confirm USDOT, fleet, or NY DOS entity ID.

name: Central PA Honor Bus Inc
carrier_operation: Nonprofit (non-stock); not a commercial school-bus carrier
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State, Bureau of Corporations (Entity ID 4187432; type: Non-Profit (Non Stock))
notes: Central PA Honor Bus Inc is a PA non-profit (non-stock) corporation incorporated 5/13/2013, registered address 1731 S York St, Mechanicsburg, PA 17055. No SAFER/USDOT carrier record found under this exact name. This entity is a veterans-honor / community-service organization (related to or affiliated with Central PA Honor Flight) that hires charter operators (e.g., Atlantic Coast Charters) for trips, not a contract school-bus operator. Likely NOT a viable tuck-in target for Summit School Services - flag for removal from prospect list.
